text: % CloudFormation Conditions @ twsuemsantie (©) scrancann e Created in the optional ‘Conditions’ section of a template ¢ Conditions are evaluated to TRUE or FALSE e .. processed before resources are created * Use the other intrinsic functions AND, EQUALS, IF, NOT, OR e ... associated with logical resources to control if they are created or not * e.g. ONEAZ, TWOAZ, THREEAZ - how many AZs to create resources in e e.g. PROD, DEV - control the size of instances created within a stack
